description_for_human: AI-powered Salesforce case triage and processing using specialized agent swarm
description_for_model: Use this plugin to triage, analyze, and process Salesforce support cases. The plugin orchestrates multiple specialized agents to handle case monitoring, attachment processing, product enrichment, analysis, summary generation, and Salesforce updates. Call triage_single_case for one case, triage_all_new_cases for batch processing, or check_aging_cases for SLA monitoring.

functions.name: triage_single_case
functions.description: Triage a single Salesforce case through the full pipeline: monitor → attachments → enrichment → analysis → summary → write back

auto_write_back.description: Whether to automatically write triage results back to Salesforce

functions.name: triage_all_new_cases
functions.description: Find and triage all new/unprocessed Salesforce cases

max_cases.description: Maximum number of cases to process

functions.name: check_aging_cases
functions.description: Find and triage cases that have exceeded SLA thresholds

hours_threshold.description: Hours since case creation to consider 'aging'

functions.name: get_triage_status
functions.description: Get current status of the triage queue and recent processing results

functions.name: get_case_summary
functions.description: Get an executive summary of a previously triaged case

functions.name: update_case_status
functions.description: Update the status or notes on a Salesforce case

internal_notes.description: Internal notes to add to the case
